cells.rationale: Reaping leaves while keeping the write-grant exclusion lock, fencing-token monotonicity, and fail-open discipline intact is validating a subtle safety-critical correctness invariant whose breach doubles writers on one tree.

Guaranteeing exactly-once mint across the unfolded-projection race and overlapping-tick reentrancy is adjudicating a subtle concurrency/idempotence invariant, though execution is bounded to a guard plus deterministic dedup key.
